issues.description: SearchDeck filter is incorrect: text says 'cost of 4 or more' (minCost: 4) but DSL has maxCost: 4 (cost of 4 or less)
Missing lookCount parameter: text specifies 'Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck' but DSL has no count specified
Missing revealCount parameter: text says 'reveal up to 1 card' but DSL does not specify the limit of 1 card to add to hand
Missing bottomDeck behavior: text says 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' but DSL does not specify this destination for non-selected cards
